args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" >/dev/null
replay_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- replay --bundle "$bundle_dir")
printf '%s' "$replay_out" | grep -q 'runtime-jit evidence:'
printf '%s' "$replay_out" | grep -q 'replay compile_free=true forbidden_queues=Compile,Assemble,ArtifactIo,Warmup'
printf '%s' "$replay_out" | grep -q '\[info\] verified_bundle'
printf 'replayed\n'
